user.title: Choose a performance profile

data_description.runtime_profile: The recommendation is based on the installation type, architecture, and known Home Assistant hardware. It is never applied again automatically after setup.
data_description.adaptive_polling: Refresh immediately when native backup activity changes, poll faster while a backup is running, and use a longer interval after repeated manager errors.

runtime_custom.title: Custom performance settings
runtime_custom.description: Set polling intervals and resource limits manually.

data.active_update_interval_minutes: Polling interval while a backup is active in minutes
data.error_backoff_interval_minutes: Polling interval after repeated errors in minutes
data.max_verification_size_gb: Maximum downloaded backup size in GB
data.max_expanded_size_gb: Maximum expanded archive size in GB
data.database_timeout_minutes: Maximum database check duration in minutes

data_description.update_interval_minutes: Base interval used while Home Assistant is idle.
data_description.active_update_interval_minutes: Temporary faster interval used while the native backup manager reports an active backup.
data_description.error_backoff_interval_minutes: Temporary slower interval used after the configured number of consecutive inventory errors.
data_description.adaptive_error_threshold: Successful inventory reads reset the consecutive error counter.
data_description.max_verification_size_gb: Stops verification before or during download when this limit is exceeded.
data_description.max_expanded_size_gb: Limits the total amount of uncompressed archive data that may be read.
data_description.verification_timeout_minutes: Stops download and archive processing after this overall duration.
data_description.database_timeout_minutes: Stops SQLite PRAGMA integrity_check after this duration.
data_description.manual_verification_cooldown_minutes: Prevents repeated manual checks. Set to 0 to disable the cooldown.

monitoring.title: Choose a monitoring policy
monitoring.description: Monitoring strictness is independent of the hardware profile.

data_description.monitoring_policy: Balanced is suitable for most installations. Strict expects newer backups and two storage locations. Custom opens every threshold.

data.minimum_backup_size_mb: Fixed minimum backup size in MB
data.maximum_size_drop_percent: Maximum allowed size drop in percent

data_description.max_age_days: A warning is shown after this many complete days.
data_description.size_check_mode: Automatic compares the newest backup with equivalent recent backups.
data_description.minimum_backup_size_mb: Only used with the fixed minimum size mode.
data_description.maximum_size_drop_percent: Used for automatic comparison with previous backups.
data_description.minimum_redundant_locations: Use 1 for one location or 2 for local storage plus NAS or cloud.
data_description.repair_issues_enabled: Create Home Assistant Repair issues for active backup problems.
data_description.analytics_window_days: Backup statistics and observed automatic-backup success use this period.

verification.title: Choose an integrity-check strategy
verification.description: Automatic archive verification can use considerable network, CPU, and temporary disk space. Deep verification additionally checks the included SQLite database.

data_description.verification_policy: Manual only is recommended for small systems. Automatic verifies each newly detected newest backup once. Deep also runs SQLite PRAGMA integrity_check.
data_description.manual_verification_cooldown_minutes: Controls when the administrator button can be used again after a manual check. Set to 0 to disable the cooldown.

presentation.title: Frontend, entiteter och aviseringar
presentation.description: Välj det valfria sidofältsgränssnittet, synliga entiteter, integritet och mobilaviseringar.

data_description.entity_mode: Standard enables the most useful monitoring and problem entities. Expert enables all analytics, diagnostic, integrity, schedule, and storage entities and the live activity journal.
data_description.expose_backup_metadata: Disabled by default. When enabled, selected diagnostics and entities may expose user-defined backup names and raw backup IDs.
data_description.notifications_enabled: Send a mobile notification when the active backup problems change.
data_description.notification_targets: Only Home Assistant Companion App notification entities are listed. Multiple devices can be selected.
data_description.notify_on_recovery: Send one final notification after all previously reported backup problems are resolved.
data_description.show_sidebar_panel: Lägger till en valfri BackupCheckup-översikt i Home Assistant-sidofältet. Sidan visar hälsa, aktiva problem, integritet, säkerhetskopieringsvärden och lagringsplatser.

summary.title: Confirm setup
summary.description: Konfigurationen är klar. Välj Skicka för att skapa BackupCheckup.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one BackupCheckup instance is allowed.

error.fixed_size_required: Enter a minimum backup size greater than 0 MB when using the fixed minimum size mode.
error.notification_target_required: Select at least one mobile device when mobile notifications are enabled.
error.active_interval_too_slow: The active polling interval must not be longer than the normal polling interval.
error.backoff_interval_too_fast: The error-backoff interval must not be shorter than the normal polling interval.

runtime.title: Performance profile
runtime.description: Changing a preset replaces the performance-sensitive values with the current preset revision.

setup_summary.title: Confirm updated setup
setup_summary.description: Den uppdaterade konfigurationen är klar. Välj Skicka för att spara den.

error.fixed_size_required: Enter a minimum backup size greater than 0 MB when using the fixed minimum size mode.
error.notification_target_required: Select at least one mobile device when mobile notifications are enabled.
error.active_interval_too_slow: The active polling interval must not be longer than the normal polling interval.

state.manager_unavailable: Hanteraren för säkerhetskopior är inte tillgänglig

manual_backup_age.name: Ålder på manuell eller annan säkerhetskopia

last_successful_automatic_event.name: Senaste lyckade händelsen för automatisk säkerhetskopiering

state.check_backup_contents: Kontrollera innehållet i den ofullständiga säkerhetskopian
state.check_backup_size: Kontrollera säkerhetskopians storlek och ledigt utrymme
state.add_storage_location: Lägg till eller återställ en lagringsplats
state.replace_backup: Ersätt eller skapa om den berörda säkerhetskopian

backup_manager_unavailable.name: Hanteraren för säkerhetskopior är inte tillgänglig

no_backup.title: Ingen säkerhetskopia finns
no_backup.description: BackupCheckup kunde inte hitta någon lagrad säkerhetskopia. Öppna Home Assistants säkerhetskopieringsinställningar och skapa en kopia.

backup_stale.title: Senaste säkerhetskopian är för gammal
backup_stale.description: Den senaste säkerhetskopian är {age} dagar gammal. Maxgränsen är {maximum} dagar. Skapa en ny kopia och kontrollera schemat.

automatic_backup_overdue.title: Automatisk säkerhetskopia är försenad
automatic_backup_overdue.description: Den senaste automatiska säkerhetskopian är {age} dagar gammal. Maxgränsen är {maximum} dagar. Kontrollera schemat.

automatic_backup_failed.title: Senaste automatiska säkerhetskopian misslyckades
automatic_backup_failed.description: Det senaste försöket var {attempt} och den senaste lyckade kopian {success}. Kontrollera loggen och lagringsplatserna.

automatic_schedule_missing.title: Schema för automatiska säkerhetskopior saknas
automatic_schedule_missing.description: Home Assistant rapporterar ingen nästa automatisk säkerhetskopia. Konfigurera eller aktivera automatiska kopior.

automatic_schedule_overdue.title: Schemat för automatisk säkerhetskopiering är försenat
automatic_schedule_overdue.description: Nästa automatiska kopia rapporterades som {scheduled}, men tiden har redan passerat. Kontrollera konfigurationen.

manager_unavailable.title: Hanteraren för säkerhetskopior är inte tillgänglig
manager_unavailable.description: Home Assistants säkerhetskopieringshanterare rapporterar tillståndet ”{state}”. Kontrollera den inbyggda integrationen eller starta om Home Assistant.

storage_error.title: Fel på lagringsplats för säkerhetskopior
storage_error.description: Home Assistant rapporterade fel för följande platser: {locations}. Kontrollera anslutning, inloggning och ledigt utrymme.

backup_size_suspicious.title: Storleken på senaste säkerhetskopian är misstänkt
backup_size_suspicious.description: Den senaste kopian är {size} och ändrades med {change} jämfört med föregående jämförbara kopia. Varningsgränsen är {threshold}%.

latest_backup_incomplete.title: Senaste säkerhetskopian är ofullständig
latest_backup_incomplete.description: The latest backup contains failed components. Failed apps: {addons}. Folders: {folders}. Storage locations: {locations}. Check the backup log and create a new backup.

backup_not_redundant.title: Säkerhetskopian lagras inte redundant
backup_not_redundant.description: Den senaste kopian finns på {current} lagringsplats(er), men {required} krävs. Lägg till eller återställ en plats.

backup_integrity_failed.title: Säkerhetskopian är skadad eller oläsbar
backup_integrity_failed.description: Den fullständiga integritetskontrollen av säkerhetskopian på {location} misslyckades {checked}. Skapa och verifiera en ny säkerhetskopia innan du förlitar dig på den berörda kopian.

temporary_cleanup_failed.title: Temporary verification data could not be removed
temporary_cleanup_failed.description: BackupCheckup could not remove private temporary verification data. Restart Home Assistant and check the temporary filesystem and available disk space.

backup_checksum_changed.title: Backup checksum changed
backup_checksum_changed.description: The stored checksum of the same backup copy changed since the previous verification. Check the storage location and verify the backup again. Last check: {checked}.

storage_data_invalid.title: BackupCheckup internal data was reset
storage_data_invalid.description: The private storage data for “{store}” was invalid or damaged and was safely reset. Review BackupCheckup settings and run a new verification if needed.

backup_integrity_warning.title: Integritetskontrollen har varningar
backup_integrity_warning.description: Den fullständiga integritetskontrollen slutfördes med varningar eller kunde inte slutföras vid {checked}. Granska resultatet och skapa eller verifiera en ny säkerhetskopia vid behov.

required_location_missing.title: Nödvändig lagringsplats saknas
required_location_missing.description: {count} lagringsplats(er) för den senaste säkerhetskopian är otillgängliga, inaktuella eller rapporterar ett fel. Återställ platsen eller skapa en ny redundant säkerhetskopia.

notification_failed.message: Testaviseringen kunde inte skickas. Kontrollera den valda mobila enheten och BackupCheckup-loggen.

verification_already_running.message: A backup verification is already running.

verification_no_backup.message: No backup is available for verification.

verification_cooldown.message: Manual verification is rate-limited. Wait until the configured {minutes}-minute cooldown has expired.

notification_not_configured.message: No notification targets are configured for BackupCheckup.
